chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 831 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.04.2022 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 5811/16 For hearing of main case None present On the last date of hearing petitioners’ counsel was put on notice to satisfy the court regarding maintainability of this petition; today however, he is called absent and there is no intimation either. This petition seeks implementation of the Judgment and Decree passed in Suit No. 341 of 1982 which otherwise could have been executed through execution. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
